name: Kettlebell Figure 8 Tactical Clean
description: A compound kettlebell move where a figure-8 pass between the legs exits directly into a tactical clean. Start in hike position with the bell between your legs. Pass the bell through your legs in a figure-8 pattern — but instead of the pass returning to a hand, the catching hand pulls the bell up into a clean to the rack position on the opposite side. Return to hike. Switch sides via the next figure-8 pass. The hand-switch happens DURING the pass; the clean happens as the catch. Combines the dance/flow quality of the figure-8 with the strength/skill of the tactical clean catch.

media.caption: Single Kettlebell Complex: Figure 8 Tactical Clean (kettleclub program)
